## Entities.IChocolateSpec type

Chocolate specification for shell, enrobing, or coating. Uses IIdsWithPreferred pattern - `ids` contains all valid chocolates, `preferredId` indicates the default/recommended one.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type IChocolateSpec = Model.IIdsWithPreferred<IngredientId>;
```
**References:** [Model.IIdsWithPreferred](./ts-chocolate.model.iidswithpreferred.md)<!-- -->, [IngredientId](./ts-chocolate.ingredientid.md)
